title: Medium Author Scraper Input
description: Configuration schema for the Medium Author Scraper - extracts all posts from a given Medium author while handling rate limits and restrictions

authorUrl.title: Author URL
authorUrl.description: The Medium profile URL of the author whose posts need to be scraped

maxPosts.title: Maximum Posts
maxPosts.description: The number of posts to scrape. Use -1 to scrape all posts

includeArticleContent.title: Include Full Content
includeArticleContent.description: Whether to scrape the full article content or just metadata

outputFormat.title: Output Format
outputFormat.description: The format of the output file

cacheEnabled.title: Enable Caching
cacheEnabled.description: If enabled, it avoids redundant requests by caching responses

requestsPerMinute.title: Requests Per Minute
requestsPerMinute.description: Number of requests allowed per minute

randomDelay.title: Random Delay
randomDelay.description: Random delay range between requests in seconds [min, max]

proxy.title: Proxy Configuration
proxy.description: Configure proxy settings to avoid IP blocks
